task_completion.description: Verify that a new product category named 'Flash Sale' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Flash Sale' in the WooCommerce Product Categories list (Products > Categories) or visible as a selectable checkbox in the product edit pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three target products are assigned to the 'Flash Sale' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Flash Sale' category checked on the edit pages for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones', 'Yoga Mat Premium', and 'LED Desk Lamp', or listed in the Categories column on the main Products page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sale prices for the three target products are updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sale Price field set to 59.99 for Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, 29.99 for Yoga Mat Premium, and 34.99 for LED Desk Lamp in their respective edit pages, or visible in the Price column on the Products page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coupon 'FLASH30' is created with the correct discount type, amount, and expiry date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the coupon edit page (General tab) or Coupons list, look for coupon code 'FLASH30', Discount type 'Percentage discount', Coupon amount '30', and Coupon expiry date '2026-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coupon has the correct minimum spend and category restrictions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the coupon edit page (Usage restriction tab), look for Minimum spend set to '50' (or 50.00) and Product categories restricted to 'Flash Sale'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coupon has the correct usage limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the coupon edit page (Usage limits tab), look for 'Usage limit per coupon' set to '100'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce GUI in a web browser to make these changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard in a browser window, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard WordPress/WooCommerce admin panel, not a text editor or mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use WP-CLI or terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing `wp wc` commands being executed to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Category: 'Flash Sale'. Target Products & Sale Prices: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' ($59.99), 'Yoga Mat Premium' ($29.99), 'LED Desk Lamp' ($34.99). Coupon Code: 'FLASH30'. Coupon Settings: Percentage discount, Amount: 30, Minimum spend: 50.00, Usage limit per coupon: 100, Restricted to category: 'Flash Sale', Expiry date: 2026-12-31.
